items.example: This story is about a man who stole a famous painting.
The problem was that he didn't have a getaway plan.
In fact, he had been planning the theft for months.

items.phrase: What he didn't realise was that...
items.translation: Чего он не осознавал — это то, что...
items.example: What he didn't realise was that the police were already there.
However, things didn't go according to plan.
Because of this, he had to escape through a window.
In the end, the painting was returned to the gallery.
When he stole the painting, things didn't go according to plan.
